desc: Harden CLI surface: remove redundancy (util, team, advance), integrate API introspection into show. 10→7 commands.

remove-util-group.desc: Delete util group: trail, checkpoint, install, federation. Move essential logic to core or admin.

validate.command: ! npx ts-node bin/roadmap.ts util help 2>&1 | grep -q 'Unknown command'

remove-team-group.desc: Delete team group: claim, dispatch, strategy, assign. Move to orient --assign only.

validate.command: ! npx ts-node bin/roadmap.ts team help 2>&1 | grep -q 'Unknown command'

remove-advance-command.desc: Delete advance command. complete auto-advances, advance is redundant.

validate.command: ! npx ts-node bin/roadmap.ts advance 2>&1 | grep -q 'Unknown command'

integrate-show-api.desc: Add API introspection to show: show <id> --api to dump node + subgraph + full spec.

validate.command: npx ts-node bin/roadmap.ts show init --api 2>/dev/null | jq -e '.spec' > /dev/null

update-routing-help.desc: Update main router + help text for 7-command surface (orient, show, complete, chart, validate, dag, spec).

test-core-commands.desc: Test core 5 (orient, show, complete, chart, validate) with new surface.

test-dag-group.desc: Verify dag group still works (expand, diff, propagate, retire, optimize, switch, spawn).

test-spec-group.desc: Verify spec group still works (plan, import, intake, compile, init).

surface-locked.desc: Surface locked: 7 commands, all tests passing, help clean (<30 lines), API introspection integrated.
